title:

CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 2.2s | LOOP: No
SVG: Paper plane icon (4 paths: body triangle, fold crease, tail fold, dotted trail line) вЂ” start position 960Г—540px, 80px wide

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #EFF6FF (very light blue)
Plane fill: #2563EB (bright blue)
Plane stroke: #1D4ED8 (darker blue, 1.5px)
Trail stroke: #93C5FD (pale blue, dashed, 2px)
Arrival sparkles: #FDE68A (warm yellow, 6px circles)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Plane starts centered, launches diagonally up-right, exits frame, leaving trail.
Trail stays visible, then 3 sparkles appear at end-point of trail.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (2.2s total):
0вЂ“0.2s: Plane at 960Г—540, scales 0.8 в†’ 1.0 (ease-out).
0.2вЂ“0.9s: Plane translates diagonally (X: 960в†’1600, Y: 540в†’280) while trail draws behind it (dashoffset 100%в†’0%, ease-in-out).
0.9вЂ“1.1s: Plane exits right edge. Trail remains visible.
1.1вЂ“1.4s: 3 sparkle dots appear at trail endpoint (X:1600, Y:280) вЂ” scale 0 в†’ 1.0 в†’ 0 in sequence (0.1s stagger), burst outward 20px radially.
1.4вЂ“2.0s: Trail fades (opacity 1.0 в†’ 0, ease-in, 0.6s).
2.0вЂ“2.2s: Hold clear frame.

EASING CURVES:
- Launch: ease-in (build speed)
- Trail draw: ease-in-out
- Sparkle burst: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
